message:
fix(share): harden viewer asset copying against symlink traversal and improve deployment detection root

bundle.rs: Canonicalize both the viewer source directory and each asset
path before copying, then verify the resolved path remains within the
viewer source tree. This prevents symlink-based path traversal attacks
where a malicious symlink inside viewer_assets/ could exfiltrate files
from outside the intended directory. Also reject non-file entries to
prevent directory confusion. Includes a Unix-specific test proving the
symlink escape is blocked.

planner.rs: Add resolve_detection_root() which walks ancestors of the
bundle path to find the nearest project root (identified by .git,
wrangler.toml, netlify.toml, .github/workflows, scripts/, or docs/
directories). This ensures deployment environment detection uses signals
from the project containing the bundle rather than the shell's cwd, which
may be a completely unrelated directory. Includes tests for both relative
and absolute bundle paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
